comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Starting implementation of shared clock core module for both demos, including explicit mode routing and logging.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Implemented shared clock core at src/pypixoo/_clock_demo.py and converted demos/clock_realtime.py + demos/storybook_clock.py into thin wrappers over the shared runtime. Added shared mode semantics, logging, reconnect loop, and routing.
